title: Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla resigns as MK party MP
bodyText:
POLITICS NEWS - uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) party MP Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla has resigned from Parliament.

This was announced by MK party national organiser Nathi Nhleko on Friday.


> Zuma-Sambudla’s resignation comes after allegations of her role in recruiting and trafficking young South African men into the Russian war effort in Ukraine.


Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
